source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Julia drew the picture on the side of a cardboard sheet, cut, folded and glued to form a cube. Which of the cubes below can be the one she did?
<image1>
<image2>
extraction_notes: options field contains only option labels, no textual option content

image_dependency: question_text explicitly refers to a drawn picture on cardboard and asks which cube below matches after cut/fold/glue, so the visual net/options are necessary
multi_step: question_text implies converting a 2D cardboard pattern into a 3D cube after cutting/folding/gluing
solver must compare the inferred cube against 5 answer choices (A-E)
the task is spatial and multimodal rather than direct text lookup
verifiability: answer_type=option and answer_text is a single choice 'A'
choices are explicitly enumerated as A-E

decision_reasons: core assets are complete: question, image, and answer are all present
asset registry passed with no recorded issues
high image dependency is supported because the required image exists
initial scoring is strong on image dependency, multi-step reasoning, and verifiability
